introduction: I am a developer and Senior Pricing Middle Officer at Louis Dreyfus Company, with many years of cross-sector experience spanning physical agricultural commodity markets, investment management, pharmaceutical support, e-invoicing, healthcare applications, engineering environments, postal services and independent e-commerce delivery.
evidence: My strongest pattern is connecting financial detail with practical technology. I combine software development, SQL investigation, Python and Excel analysis, AI-assisted automation, pricing and valuation controls, P&L and risk awareness, and clear stakeholder communication to make complex workflows more reliable.

highlights.text: Master's Degree in E-Management, graduated with Honours and full academic excellence
Senior Pricing Middle Officer in global agricultural commodity markets
Daily AI tools and coding-agent workflows for development, analysis and delivery
Pricing knowledge across physical markets, futures, options, basis, freight and FX

focusAreas.title: Developer Mindset
focusAreas.description: I work like a modern developer: using AI agents, structured analysis, code, tests and documentation to move faster while keeping the work understandable, maintainable and useful.
bullets: AI-assisted coding, review, documentation and refactoring workflows
Python, SQL and practical automation for business and finance problems

focusAreas.title: Pricing And Middle Office
focusAreas.description: My experience now spans commodity pricing at Louis Dreyfus Company and investment-management operations at Man Group. I work with the connections between physical and logistics-linked trading, cash and exchange-traded prices, valuation, P&L, risk data, reconciliations and the technology that supports those workflows.
bullets: Price curves, basis and premiums, freight and FX components, futures and options
Mark-to-market valuation, market and credit-risk data, reconciliations and collaboration across Trading, Middle Office, Risk and Technology

focusAreas.title: Data And Automation
focusAreas.description: I use SQL, Python, scripting, AI-assisted analysis and reporting habits to investigate data breaks, validate financial workflows, automate checks and create better operational visibility.
bullets: SQL investigation, reconciliation, pricing and validation checks
Python automation, monitoring and reporting improvements

focusAreas.title: Builder Mindset
focusAreas.description: Neutron.bg is my live Django e-commerce project: a working product where I own the catalog, checkout, order lifecycle, admin workflows and hosting/deployment thinking behind a real web storefront.
bullets: Live Django 5.1 e-commerce application at neutron.bg
Checkout, order lifecycle and supplier workflow design
